visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black cold-shoulder top and a silver necklace, is standing in front of a refrigerated food section. She is holding a large, clear circular plastic container filled with seafood noodles. Behind her, other shoppers are visible in the distance, and white product price tags line the shelves. (2) The camera zooms into a close-up of the food container, showing fresh ingredients like pink shrimp, white squid rings, slices of white fish, green lime wedges, and leafy green herbs nestled on top of white rice noodles. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home environment where two women are sitting at a dining table. The woman from the previous scene is on the left, and another woman wearing a zebra-print bucket hat and a tan top is on the right. They are enthusiastically holding up the food container and a separate plastic bag of clams toward the camera. (4) The camera focuses on the contents of the container as they are being poured into a black pot. The ingredients are clearly visible: tofu skin, onions, and tomatoes are added to the noodles. (5) In a close-up, the food is being stirred in the black pot, which is now filled with a bright orange-red broth. Steam is rising, and the seafood looks cooked and vibrant. (6) The two women are shown eating the noodles from the pot using black spoons. They are smiling, nodding, and giving thumbs-up gestures to indicate their enjoyment, with the home interior background showing a cozy, lived-in space with plush toys on a shelf behind them.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 小朋友拿什麼. [Variety]: 粉~ 粉~ 粉~. (2) [Variety]: 誠意十足 滿滿海鮮. [Slogan]: 泰式酸辣海鮮河粉. [Variety]: 粉~~. (3) [Subtitle]: 這上面的海鮮量很誠意耶 看起來很好吃. [Variety]: 粉~. (4) [Subtitle]: 夏天到了就是要吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後這是437元. (6) [Subtitle]: 看看這天氣那麼熱 來看看解不解暑. (7) [Subtitle]: 我覺得檸檬可以給一整顆. [Variety]: 粉~. (8) [Subtitle]: 那我們自己加一顆好了. (9) [Subtitle]: 好市多的粉我們來吃吃看. (10) [Subtitle]: 它的裡面有烏鯉魚 透抽 然後蝦仁 豆皮 九層塔 番茄跟那個洋蔥. (11) [Subtitle]: 蛤蜊的話有6顆 而且給的很大. (12) [Subtitle]: 我們現在來加熱看看它的湯底 有沒有厲害. [Variety]: 有沒有厲害. (13) [Slogan]: 泰式酸辣海鮮河粉. [Variety]: 一公斤只要395. [Slogan]: 超級划算. (14) [Subtitle]: 而且它非常的道地 它非常的泰式 整個就是又酸又辣. [Variety]: 又酸又辣. (15) [Subtitle]: 所以如果你平常很喜歡吃非常酸辣 或者你常常嫌外面的那個泰式料理不夠泰的話 一定要來試試看這個. (16) [Subtitle]: 它的海鮮給的非常足 然後另外還給你番茄跟洋蔥去熬湯底. (17) [Subtitle]: 另外還加了九層塔提味 所以這整個口感都非常的豐富. (18) [Subtitle]: 它建議是400毫升水 我覺得加到800都完全沒問題. (19) [Subtitle]: 以及它的辣度是快到中辣 吃起來真是超爽超過癮. [Variety]: 超爽超過癮. (20) [Subtitle]: 我們已經吃了半鍋囉 已經快被我們清空了 不好意思.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a black cutout top. The other wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat and an orange-brown top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scenes are in a Costco warehouse with refrigerated shelves and shoppers. Later scenes transition to a home living room with a dining table and shelves containing yellow plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music begins at a fast tempo. A female voice speaks with high pitch and excitement, introducing the supermarket find. Background commercial hum is very faint. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX triggers as the shot changes to a food close-up. The music maintains a strong, driving beat. (3) A 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a price point mentioned by the speaker. The vocal delivery is rapid and enthusiastic. (4) Transition to an indoor home setting; the acoustic texture shifts to include more room resonance. Two female voices interact, with sounds of plastic bags rustling clearly audible as they unpack ingredients. (5) Bubbling and simmering liquid sounds are introduced during the cooking segment, mixed with the ongoing upbeat BGM. (6) Slurping and exaggerated vocal reactions ('Mm!', 'Delicious!') are heard, accompanied by cartoon-style 'sparkle' SFX. The music swells for the finale as both voices speak simultaneously in celebration.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review and recommend the Thai Seafood Tom Yum Pho from Costco. It uses an energetic vlog style to show the shopping process, the value for money (highlighting seafood quantity and price), the ease of preparation at home, and a positive taste test reaction to encourage viewers to purchase the product during the summer.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, price, and brand (Costco/Kirkland Signature), along with a clear recommendation to viewers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy, social-media native food review with dense text overlays and fast-paced editing typical of short-form video platforms.
